final:
module T_FlipFlop (
    input wire T,
    input wire clk,
    output reg Q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (T) begin
            Q <= ~Q; // Toggle Q if T is high
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (Q) begin
        Q <= ~Q;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
